topic.what: Quantum-augmented security framework combining QKD, QRNG, Ping-Pong IDS, and QCA token authentication for microgrid defense
topic.how: Discrete-event cyber-physical simulator with 4 integrated layers (physical power, communication network, quantum security infrastructure, threat-defense) evaluating attacks across star/ring/mesh/two-cluster topologies
topic.why_matters: Microgrids are critical infrastructure vulnerable to cyber-physical attacks; classical crypto vulnerable to quantum adversaries; QuAM enables system-level evaluation of quantum-secured communications for energy resilience

characteristics.what_it_measures: Percentage of malicious messages blocked by defense
characteristics.context: Full quantum stack achieves complete blocking of coordinated FDI+spoofing and multi-node attacks at intensity S3

characteristics.what_it_measures: Energy not served during attack windows
characteristics.vs_baseline: 52 kWh (FDI+spoof, no def), 38 kWh (multi-node, no def)
characteristics.context: Quantum defense reduces unserved energy by ~77% vs no defense, ~50% vs classical defense

characteristics.what_it_measures: Mean time for control messages to reach actuators
characteristics.context: Quantum stack adds ~35ms overhead vs no defense; ~18ms vs classical defense across all topologies
P95 latency stays below 75ms within 100ms protection-class budget across all scales

characteristics.what_it_measures: Quantum key material consumed per authenticated message
characteristics.context: Scales from ~700 to ~730 bits/msg at 20 nodes due to entanglement verification rounds

characteristics.what_it_measures: WLS state estimator bad-data detection rate
characteristics.context: Star topology highest at ~33% due to centralized observability; drops to near-0% with quantum defense

novelty: First simulation framework integrating QKD+Ping-Pong IDS+QCA for microgrid defense
Ablation study identifying QCA token authentication as decisive quantum component
Systematic evaluation across 4 topologies, 3 defense tiers, multiple attack vectors
Quantified trade-off analysis between privacy, availability, and operational cost
open_problems: Hardware-in-the-loop validation with real QKD devices
Adaptive adversaries using RL to escalate attack strategies
